commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed because the PR already contains the focused source and test changes; the remaining action is normal maintainer review and exact-head CI.; Cleared: The diff only changes doctor scan logic and a colocated Vitest test; it does not alter dependencies, workflows, secrets handling, install scripts, or privileged execution paths. commands.review_summary:
The PR filters plugin session-state doctor scans to entries with route-state fields, memoizes resolved routes by agent id, disables manifest model-id normalization in the scan path, and adds a focused regression/performance test.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main resolves routes for every session-store key before filtering, and the PR body reports a real large-store doctor run where that path failed to complete promptly; I did not execute the CLI repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because the PR already contains the focused source and test changes; the remaining action is normal maintainer review and exact-head CI.
